---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Lucia S. Layritz"
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">

Hi, I am Lucia and I am a climate scientist currently based at UC Berkeley.

&thinsp;

I am broadly interested in the impact of extreme events on the coupled land surface - atmosphere system, and vegetation recovery dynamics after  wildfire and other ecosystem disturbances. My work spans a wide range of geographies, mostly boreal, mediterranean and Dryland ecosystems

&thinsp;

The main tools I use for this are numerical models of varying complexity, which I supplement with observational records from long-term monitoring and field campaigns as well as satellite data. 


&thinsp;

My work aims to inform strategies for climate adaptation and ecological resilience, and I work closely with land managers and ecologists in U.S. National Parks across the Western US.

```


### Education

- **PhD** Life Science *Technical University of Munich*
- **MSc** Mathematical Modelling *King's College London, UK*
- **MSc** Environmental Science and Engineering *Technical University of Berlin, Germany*
